name: Holiday Sugar Cookies
recipeIngredient: Colored sprinkles or sugar (for decorating; optional)
recipeInstructions:
Beat butter and sugar in a large bowl with an electric mixer until creamy. Add egg; beat until fluffy. Stir in flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt until well blended. Form into a ball; wrap in plastic wrap and refrigerate about 2 hours or until firm.
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 C). Roll out dough, a small portion at a time, to 1/4 inch thickness on a lightly floured surface with a lightly floured rolling pin. Keep remaining dough chilled. Cut with a 3-inch cookie cutter. Sprinkle with colored sprinkles if desired. Transfer to ungreased cookie sheets. Bake 7-9 minutes until edges are lightly browned. Cool for 1 minute on the cookie sheets, then remove to wire racks and cool completely. Store in an airtight container. Makes about 3 dozen cookies.
